title: SubstitutionPartyElection
description: Party specific elections for substitution of posted collateral.

party.description: The party that is acting as the Pledgor/Obligor/Chargor/Security Provider.

needsConsent.description: The election as to whether the Pledgor/Obligor/Chargor/Security Provider must obtain the Secured Partys consent for any collateral substitution.

substitutionDateLanguage.description: Substitution Date has the meaning specified in Paragraph4(d)(ii), unless otherwise specified.

specificConsentLanguage.description: Specific consent language might be specified by the parties.

legacyConsent.description: The process for substituting/exchanging one form of collateral held by a party for a different form of collateral, used with legacy agreements.
